props.name: initialtab
props.description: The initially active tab (1-based index). If not set, the first tab is active.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: Sets the visual style of tabs. 'segmented' shows pill/button style tabs.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Tab layout orientation. 'auto' stacks vertically on mobile, 'horizontal' keeps horizontal on all screen sizes.
